title: bridge-matrix: is_bot_sender fails for http:// URLs, causing echo loop
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs:124-126 uses trim_start_matches('https://') to extract homeserver domain. For http:// URLs, the strip is a no-op, domain becomes 'http://matrix.example.com/...' and the constructed bot MXID never matches any real sender. The echo-loop filter silently fails: every message the bot posts to Matrix is re-broadcast back into nie indefinitely. Fix: strip both 'https://' and 'http://' schemes, or use a URL parser.
